font-preloads.description: Your site or app's URLs where Adaptive Acceleration is actively preloading fonts.

preconnect-header.description: Commonly loaded headers. Adaptive Acceleration identifies them based on gathered real-user monitoring data. These headers are targeted for preconnecting.

problem.description: Represents error data in the [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457) Problem Details format.

detail.description: Diagnostic instructions to locate and fix the problem. Appears as `null` if no further details about the specific nature of the error that occurred are available.

httpStatus.description: The HTTP status code that categorizes this error case.

instance.description: A unique value generated with each API call.

title.description: A summary of each error case.

property.description: Encapsulates Adaptive Acceleration report that targets a specific Ion property.

commonPreconnectHeader.description: Commonly loaded headers. Adaptive Acceleration identifies them based on gathered real-user monitoring data. These headers are targeted for preconnecting.

commonPushedResources.description: URLs for which Adaptive Acceleration currently performs a server push.

creationDate.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the system created the Adaptive Acceleration report.

domainSpecificResources.description: Encapsulates Adaptive Acceleration report rules targeted to a specific domain.

domainSpecificCommonPushedResource.description: URLs for which Adaptive Acceleration currently performs a server push.

domainSpecificFontPreloads.description: Your site or app's URLs where Adaptive Acceleration is actively preloading fonts.

isAbTesting.description: Indicates whether you've enabled [A/B testing](https://techdocs.akamai.com/ion/docs/set-up-adaptive-acceleration#5-optionally-enable-ab-testing) in your Ion property. A/B testing compares two versions of a webpage or app against each other to determine which one performs better.

isActive.description: Indicates whether you've enabled Adaptive Acceleration in your Ion property.

isHttp3Enabled.description: Indicates whether you've enabled HTTP/3 protocol in your Ion property. The [HTTP/3 behavior](https://techdocs.akamai.com/property-mgr/reference/ga-http3) is automatically included and enabled in the default rule.

lastModifiedDate.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the system last modified the Adaptive Acceleration report.

lastReset.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when you [last reset](https://techdocs.akamai.com/adaptive-acceleration/reference/post-property-reset) the Adaptive Acceleration data-gathering report.

pageSpecificRules.description: Encapsulates Adaptive Acceleration property rules targeted to a specific page.

experience.description: Data specific to A/B testing results.

isMobile.description: Indicates the page view mode. When `true`, the page URL is consumed in the mobile mode. When `false`, it's consumed in the desktop mode.

pageSpecificFontPreloads.description: Your site or app's URLs where Adaptive Acceleration is actively preloading fonts.

pageSpecificPreconnectHeader.description: Commonly loaded headers. Adaptive Acceleration identifies them based on gathered real-user monitoring data. These headers are targeted for preconnecting.

pageSpecificPushedResources.description: URLs for which Adaptive Acceleration currently performs a server push.

version.description: The version of the Adaptive Acceleration rules.

zoneDeployDate.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the Adaptive Acceleration report was last updated.

pushed-resources.description: URLs for which Adaptive Acceleration currently performs a server push.

system-problem.description: Represents error data in the [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457) Problem Details format.

detail.description: Diagnostic instructions to locate and fix the problem.

instance.description: A unique value generated with each API call.

method.description: An HTTP method used in a given API call.

requestId.description: A unique identifier of each API call.

requestTime.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when each API call was made.

status.description: The HTTP status code that categorizes this error case.

title.description: A summary of each error case.

externalDocs.description: See documentation for Akamai's Adaptive Acceleration API

info.description:
View which rules Adaptive Acceleration applies to a property, and
generate new rules.
info.title: Akamai: Adaptive Acceleration API

get.description: Gets the current Adaptive Acceleration report for a specific Ion property.

externalDocs.description: See documentation for this operation in Akamai's Adaptive Acceleration API

parameters.description: For customers who manage more than one account, this [runs the operation from another account](https://techdocs.akamai.com/developer/docs/manage-many-accounts-with-one-api-client). The Identity and Access Management API provides a [list of available account switch keys](https://techdocs.akamai.com/iam-api/reference/get-client-account-switch-keys).
parameters.name: accountSwitchKey

post.description: Resets the report Adaptive Acceleration uses to define a server push and preconnect assets. Adaptive Acceleration reviews current real-user monitoring data to reestablish this report.

externalDocs.description: See documentation for this operation in Akamai's Adaptive Acceleration API

parameters.description: For customers who manage more than one account, this [runs the operation from another account](https://techdocs.akamai.com/developer/docs/manage-many-accounts-with-one-api-client). The Identity and Access Management API provides a [list of available account switch keys](https://techdocs.akamai.com/iam-api/reference/get-client-account-switch-keys).
